creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
This seems to build fine for me and does not appear to be failing on the
FreeBSD build cluster.

- Are your ports (tree/installed ports) up to date?

- Do you have anything in /etc/make.conf?

- Are you using any options for elvis that differ from the defaults?

- Is there any additional information you can provide that would help?


http://people.freebsd.org/~zi/elvis-2.2.0_3.log

-r
